short_summary: US-Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: The US-Iran deal momentum is the most significant new development for Ukraine, as deepening US engagement in the Middle East risks diverting attention and resources from Ukrainian support.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal within reach; UAE unlocks frozen Iranian funds
top_events.summary: Growing US focus on sealing an Iran deal risks diverting diplomatic and political bandwidth away from Ukraine, potentially slowing Western support at a critical moment in the war.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues, no major change
top_events.summary: Fighting continues across Ukrainian territory with no significant escalation or breakthrough reported this cycle; the baseline war situation persists.

top_events.title: EU accession process for Ukraine formally launched — no new step
top_events.summary: Accession talks continue without a new qualitative development this cycle; long-term positive signal but no immediate change for Ukrainian residents.
